identity.content:
# Identity

## Agency Brand
[Agency Name] is a [type: digital, creative, full-service] agency.
We help [types of clients] with [services: branding, web dev, marketing, design].

## Services
- **[Service 1]:** [Brief description]
- **[Service 2]:** [Brief description]
- **[Service 3]:** [Brief description]

## Team Structure
- [X] people across [departments: design, dev, strategy, account management]
- Key roles: [Creative Director, Lead Developer, Account Manager, etc.]

## Values
- [e.g., Quality over quantity]
- [e.g., Client partnership, not just service]
- [e.g., Stay curious, keep learning]

instructions.content:
# Instructions

## Language
Default to [English/Italian/etc.] for internal work.
Match client's language for client-facing deliverables.

## Brand Guidelines
- Use our brand voice: [professional yet approachable / bold and creative / etc.]
- Agency colors: [hex codes]
- Always include agency branding on deliverables

## Quality Standards
- All copy must be proofread before delivery
- Design work follows our grid system and component library
- Code must pass linting and basic tests before deployment
- Client presentations follow our deck template
